summary: Added focused Hyprland monitor rule helper tests that harden f64 boundary conversion, scale formatting, Lua string escaping, and gcd-based scale reduction against the supplied mutation survivor cluster.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Evidence records the relevant workspace mutation baseline cluster for Hyprland monitor rule helpers.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-hyprland-rule-mutation-hardening/notes.md records the f64_to_nonzero_u32, format_scale, lua_string, and greatest_common_divisor survivors supplied by the qd node.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Focused tests cover f64_to_nonzero_u32 boundary handling, format_scale formatting, lua_string escaping, and scale/gcd reduction through public or crate-local behavior.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: crates/hyprland/src/adapter/rule.rs contains focused unit tests for all listed helpers, including public monitor_rule formatting and config_from_monitor scale reduction.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Run a targeted mutation check for crates/hyprland/src/adapter/rule.rs if feasible, or document residual surviving rule mutants with rationale.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: Orchestrator rerun: 45 mutants tested in 16s: 27 caught, 18 unviable. No missed mutants and no timeouts.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: nix develop -c cargo test -p madobe-hyprland --all-features passes.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: Orchestrator rerun passed with 12 unit tests, 9 integration tests, and 0 doc tests.
Orchestrator rerun passed after all evidence and report edits.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Produce requested evidence and report files.

commandsRun.command: nix develop -c cargo mutants -p madobe-hyprland --file crates/hyprland/src/adapter/rule.rs --timeout 120 --jobs 2 --all-features --output /tmp/madobe-rule-mutants-orchestrator

realWorldValidation.evidence: This node hardens Hyprland monitor rule/config helper tests only.
